title: taraxacum rotundatum
intro: Taraxacum rotundatum, also known as the round-leaved dandelion, is a perennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family, characterized by its round-shaped leaves and yellow flowers. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including arthritis, digestive issues, and skin problems. The health benefits of Taraxacum rotundatum include reducing inflammation, improving liver function, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum rotundatum typically involve infusing the leaves and roots in hot water or oil to create teas, tinctures, or salves for topical application.
